title: vincetoxicum littorale
intro: Vincetoxicum littorale, also known as Lithospermum littorale or Yellow Gentian, is a perennial plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Vincetoxicum littorale is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
